task_completion.description: Verify the case name is entered correctly in the New Case wizard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'New Case Information' dialog in Autopsy with 'USB_Investigation_2024' typed into the 'Case Name' text field.

task_completion.description: Verify the case number is entered correctly in the Optional Information step.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Optional Information' dialog in the New Case wizard with 'CASE-2024-001' typed into the 'Number' text field.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct data source type is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Add Data Source' wizard with the 'Disk Image or VM File' option selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct disk image path is provided.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Add Data Source' wizard showing the path '/home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd' in the path selection field.

task_completion.description: Verify all ingest modules are deselected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Configure Ingest Modules' step in the Add Data Source wizard. All checkboxes next to the listed modules (e.g., Recent Activity, Hash Lookup, etc.) must be unchecked.

task_completion.description: Verify the case and data source were successfully created and added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the main Autopsy window. The left-hand tree view (Data Explorer) should show the case 'USB_Investigation_2024' and the data source 'ntfs_undel.dd' listed under 'Data Sources'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Autopsy GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Autopsy application windows and dialogs being actively interacted with, rather than terminal commands creating directories or SQLite databases manually.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the real Autopsy application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown must be the standard Autopsy Java-based GUI with its characteristic icons, menus, and layout, not a text editor or mock application.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not just print the expected output in a terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not simply echo 'Case USB_Investigation_2024 created' or similar success messages in a terminal window to fake completion.
